hero.title: This is a workspace home for service operations, reference documents, and platform settings.

description.local: In Local Demo, permission behavior is simplified: ADMIN has broad access, while non-ADMIN ticket actions depend on the user's relationship to each ticket.
description.remote: This home is the entry point for navigating the main work areas of the Service Desk portfolio. In Remote mode, you can review permission flows closer to real service operations by combining Role with the user's relationship to each ticket.

about.title: About this home
about.description: This section explains the current runtime mode of the portfolio portal and the main navigation scope.

description.local: In Local Demo, Service Desk and settings use mock-backed flows, while documents remain available as reference screens. Permission checks are simplified: ADMIN has broad access, and non-ADMIN ticket actions depend on ticket relationships.
description.remote: In Remote mode, the Service Desk flow, documents, and settings screens can be connected to real APIs, while permission behavior reflects both Role and user relationships.

local.note1: Protected routes are designed as internal portal screens after login, not as a public landing page.
local.note2: In Local Demo, permissions are intentionally simplified: ADMIN has broad access, and non-ADMIN actions require a ticket relationship such as requester, assignee, or another relevant participant.
local.note3: Runtime branching is orchestrated through route handlers (LOCAL handler vs REMOTE proxy), so the UI can keep a consistent workflow across modes.

remote.note1: Protected routes are designed as internal portal screens after login, not as a public landing page.
remote.note2: In Remote mode, access scope is determined by considering not only Role, but also relationships such as requester, assignee, and approver.
remote.note3: Ticket, document, approval, assignment, and settings data are connected through real API boundaries to provide a flow closer to an operational environment.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.description: Open the main work areas you are most likely to need right after sign-in.

serviceDesk.title: Service Desk
serviceDesk.description: Browse tickets, review queue status, and continue current work.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.description: Open working notes, design references, and implementation docs.

systemSettings.title: System Settings
systemSettings.description: Review portal configuration areas and service operation settings.

serviceDeskSetup.title: Service Desk Setup
serviceDeskSetup.description: Inspect categories, approval steps, assignment rules, and SLA-related setup.

workSummary.title: Work Summary
workSummary.description: Lightweight operational context for the demo portal home.

openTickets.label: Open Tickets
openTickets.description: Issues currently in progress across support queues.

pendingApprovals.label: Pending Approvals
pendingApprovals.description: Requests waiting for workflow or policy confirmation.

workingItems.label: Working Items
workingItems.description: Active implementation and follow-up tasks in this demo scope.

resolvedThisWeek.label: Resolved This Week
resolvedThisWeek.description: Completed tickets, fixes, and iteration outcomes.

highlights.title: Recent & Highlights
highlights.description: Areas that best represent the current project direction and recent work context.

ticketWorkspace.title: Ticket Workspace
ticketWorkspace.description: Main working area for search, filtering, and ticket follow-up.

authSessionFlow.title: Auth & Session Flow
authSessionFlow.description: Login experience, redirect handling, and the AuthUser/SessionUser/AppUser separation with session-aware impersonation.

serviceDeskSettings.title: Service Desk Settings
serviceDeskSettings.description: Approval step, assignment rule, and category management surfaces.

documentsHub.title: Documents Hub
documentsHub.description: Reference area for docs, notes, and future decision records.

currentFocus.title: Current Focus
currentFocus.description: A compact briefing panel for what this portal is emphasizing right now.
currentFocus.panelDescription: The home screen is intentionally scoped as an internal workspace entry point.

items.goal2: Keep the UI runtime-agnostic by handling LOCAL and REMOTE branching in route handlers
items.goal3: Prepare to replace mock summary content with API/database-backed workspace data in later stages

nextIntegrations.title: Suggested next integrations
nextIntegrations.description: Connect the summary cards to ticket counts, approvals, and recent document activity once the protected home is ready to consume real workspace data.

resetDemo.title: Reset Demo
resetDemo.description: Reset local demo data and restore the initial mock data.

limited.title: Remote demo is limited
limited.description: Database-backed pages are still being connected. Please use the Home, Demo and Documents pages for now.
